title: coincya mariolensis
intro: Coincya mariolensis, also known as Coincya montana or Cornish daisy, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the western coast of the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Coincya mariolensis is traditionally prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is used to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues.
